title: Roundtable judge verdict
description: One judge's ruling on each still-open point, after seeing every seat's final position and the organizer's structured analysis (which the judge validates/challenges rather than re-derives). Judges are read-only and rule on the merits.

verdicts.description: One ruling per open point (C#/B#/U#, legacy D#).

ruling.description: The judge's decision on this point — which position is correct, or a better synthesis.

confidence.description: The judge's confidence (0-100) in this ruling.

sensitivity_note.description: Whether/how this ruling depends on judge choice — e.g. 'a weaker judge could plausibly rule the other way' or 'robust, any judge would agree'. Drives confidence-drag in the report. Empty string if not sensitive.
